plugins.name: VRChat Auto-Uploader
plugins.description: Batch-uploads avatar .unitypackage files to VRChat with the 25% failure rate patched — event-based ImportPackage wait, SessionState persistence, shader-extension sanitizer, and popup suppressor with per-dialog try/catch.

plugins.name: Hello Plugin
plugins.description: Reference plugin — demonstrates the IPC bridge by calling scan and printing the number of cached bundles.
